next_evidence_queue.operator_next_step: Replay candidate exits with trusted OPRA/NBBO bid/ask before any policy discussion.
Validate the same predeclared relaxation on later dates/fresh paper before policy discussion.

proof_policy.readback_is: read-only diagnostic replay of predeclared chain-native entry-filter relaxation scenarios
proof_policy.readback_is_not: scanner policy, contract-selection policy, broker recommendation, DB mutation, lane promotion, or P&L proof
proof_policy.trusted_proof_standard: P&L requires exact OPRA/NBBO entry and exit bid/ask evidence; this report only diagnoses entry-candidate availability

scenario_grid.description: Widen only the max spread-width percent cap.
Widen only the entry DTE search window.
Remove entry-leg bid/ask and short-bid caps only.
Broad diagnostic relaxation of debit, width, DTE, prior continuity, and entry-liquidity caps.
